units.name: Shade
units.prompt: Cloak immediately on turn 1. Move toward the enemy medic or weakest target. Use shadow_strike when adjacent while cloaked. Use breach to sabotage high-value targets.

units.name: Bastion
units.prompt: Advance toward the nearest enemy. Use shield_wall facing the direction with the most enemies. If an enemy is adjacent, attack them.

units.name: Prophet
units.prompt: Use scan to reveal enemy prompts and cloaked units. Stay at max range (≤4 tiles for scan). Use recalibrate on wounded allies to buff them. Keep distance from enemies and avoid adjacent vectors.

units.name: Lens
units.prompt: Scan priority targets each turn to reveal their strategy. Use recalibrate on your damage dealer to boost effectiveness. Stay behind allies and maintain range. Never get adjacent to enemy vectors.

units.name: Ghost
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Lifeline
units.prompt: Keep your frontliner alive with patch. Stay behind them for cover. Overclock your striker or specter when no healing is needed.

actions.thinking: Round 1 — priority is to cloak immediately per orders and TIP. Enemies are all 3-5 tiles away, none in range. I'll move toward the enemy damage dealers (Prophet at 4,0 or Shade at 2,0) while cloaking. Move south toward center-field to close distance, then cloak. Best move is toward (3,2) to advance toward Bastion for a potential breach next turn.

All enemies are out of scan range (dist 5-7, need ≤4). I need to move closer. Moving to (2,2) brings me 3 tiles south, putting Shade at dist=2 and Bastion at dist=2 from there. Valid moves include (2,2). After moving to (2,2), I can scan Shade at (2,0) which would be dist=2. Recalibrate Ghost as damage dealer is secondary. Priority: close range then scan.

Lens is at dist=4 but the recon shows inRange=false from current position (4,0). I need to move closer to bring Lens into scan range. Moving to (3,1) would put me closer. From (3,1), dist to Lens at (2,2) = |3-2|+|1-2| = 1+1 = 2, well within scan range. I'll move to (3,1) then scan Lens.
Round 1 — cloak immediately per orders. Then move toward Lens at (2,2) to set up shadow_strike or breach next turn. Can reach (2,1) which puts me adjacent to Lens.

Lens is wounded at 6/7 HP and is 5 tiles away. I need to move closer to be able to heal. Moving to (3,4) gets me dist=3 from Lens at (2,2), still not adjacent. Best move toward Lens is (3,3) which puts me at dist=2. Actually let me check: from (3,3) to (2,2) is dist=2, still not adjacent. I can move up to 3 tiles. From (4,5) moving to (2,4) puts me at dist=2 from Lens(2,2). Still not adjacent. I need to get to (2,3) or (3,2) to be adjacent to Lens, but those aren't in my valid moves list. Closest I can get is (3,3) - dist=2 from Lens, or (2,4) - dist=2 from Lens. Neither is adjacent. I'll move to (3,3) to close the gap, then wait since no heal is possible this turn.
Both enemies are at dist=2, not adjacent. I need to advance. Moving to (3,2) closes on Lifeline at (3,3) and Lens at (2,2). Then use shield_wall facing N to protect against enemies to the north.

Cloak expires after this turn. Lens is adjacent at (2,2) facing S — I can move to (2,3) to get behind Lens, then breach them to control a high-value oracle. That's better than shadow_strike since breach has 2 uses and Lens is an oracle worth controlling.

secondAction.addendum: Move toward your own backline and away from enemies

actions.thinking: Cloak expires this turn. I'm behind Shade (dist=2) but no reachable behind-tile. Bastion is adjacent at (3,1) facing N — I can move to (3,0) to get behind them, then breach to turn them. Orders say use breach on sentinels to break defensive posture. Move to (3,0) first, then breach Bastion from behind.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from your allies and attack Prophet next turn.

actions.thinking: Ghost is adjacent at (3,0) - scan is blocked when adjacent to enemy Vector... wait, Ghost is a specter not a vector. I can scan Ghost. But scan deals 1dmg and reveals prompt. More valuable: move away from Ghost first to maintain safety, then scan Lifeline or Lens. If I move to (5,1), Ghost is at dist=2+, giving me range options. Actually, scan Ghost now while adjacent - it deals 1dmg and reveals prompt. But Ghost already acted this round (Foresight shows Ghost moved). Better to move to (4,1) or (5,0) to create distance, then scan Lifeline at (3,3) from range. From (4,1): Lifeline at (3,3) = dist of 3, in range. From (5,1): Lifeline at (3,3) = dist ~3, in range. Let me move to (5,1) to escape Ghost adjacency, then scan Lifeline to reveal their prompt.

Orders say move toward backline, away from enemies. I'm at (2,2). Shade is adjacent at (2,3) and Bastion is at (3,1). Need to retreat south/away. Valid moves include (1,1), (1,2), (0,2) etc. Moving to (1,1) gets me away from Shade and Bastion. Then can move again or wait. Actually I only get one move. Best retreat tile away from enemies: (0,1) is valid, moves me far from Shade(2,3) and Bastion(3,1). Or (1,0) moves south. Let me pick (1,1) to create distance from both threats while staying on valid tile.

Shade is adjacent at (2,3) and I'm at (3,3) — enemy adjacent blocks patch/overclock. I need to move away from Shade first. Moving to (4,3) gets me away from Shade. Then I'm still dist=2 from Bastion, dist=4 from Lens. I can't reach Lens this turn (dist=4, mv=3 gets me to 1 away). Ghost is full HP, no heal needed. No allies adjacent after move so no ability is useful. Move to (4,3) and wait.

Orders say move away from allies and attack Prophet next turn. Prophet is at (5,1). Moving to (4,1) gets me closer to Prophet while moving away from allies at (2,3) and (5,1). Ghost is adjacent at (3,0) - I can attack now since they're in range, then be positioned near Prophet. But orders say attack Prophet NEXT turn, so I should reposition. I'll attack Ghost first (they're right here at dist 1), then move to (4,1) to be adjacent to Prophet for next turn. Wait - orders say move AWAY from allies. Prophet is an ally at (5,1). Moving to (4,1) puts me closer to Prophet. I should go to (4,0) or (2,0) to be away from allies. But I need to be adjacent to Prophet next turn to attack. I'll attack Ghost now (opportunity), then move to (4,2) which is away from Shade at (2,3) and positions me to reach Prophet next turn.
Prophet is the enemy damage dealer (oracle). I can reach (5,0) which is directly behind Prophet at (5,1) facing N. Move to (5,0), then shadow_strike to deal 1 damage while staying cloaked.

Ghost is adjacent at (5,0) — scan is blocked when adjacent to enemy. I need to move away first. Moving to (5,3) puts me 3 tiles from Ghost (unblocked) and 1 tile from Lifeline at (4,3). Actually, let me move to (3,2) — that's 3 tiles from Ghost and 2 from Lens (still out of 4 range). Better: move to (5,4) to get distance from Ghost, then scan Lifeline or recalibrate Shade. Wait — Lifeline is already scanned. Let me scan Ghost after moving away. Move to (5,3): dist to Ghost = 3, in scan range. Then scan Ghost to reveal prompt and deal 1 damage.
Orders are to move toward backline and away from enemies. I'm at (1,1). Enemies are at (2,3) and (4,2). Backline is to the west/south. Move to (0,0) to retreat away from Shade at (2,3). Then wait.

Lifeline (medic) is at (4,3), dist=2, and I'm already behind them. I can move to (3,3) which puts me adjacent and behind, then use breach to take control of the enemy medic. Breach cooldown is 1 turn so I can't use it yet. Shadow_strike instead — move to (3,3) behind Lifeline, then shadow_strike for 1 damage while staying cloaked.

I'm at 3/5 HP surrounded by 3 enemies. Patch is blocked when adjacent to enemy. I need to escape - move away from the cluster to survive. Moving to (4,4) gets me away from Bastion at (4,2) and Shade at (3,3), though Prophet at (5,3) stays adjacent. Better to move to (4,5) to break adjacency with all enemies and survive.

Orders say move away from allies and attack Prophet next turn. Prophet is at (5,3). I need to get adjacent to Prophet to attack. Moving to (5,2) puts me adjacent to Prophet at (5,3) - that's one tile north, within attack range. This also moves me away from Shade at (3,3) and toward the enemy side. I'll move to (5,2) and wait - next turn I can attack Prophet.

Ghost is wounded at (5,0), dist 3 — already scanned. Lifeline is wounded at (4,5), dist 3 — already scanned. Both are in scan range but prompts already known. Foresight shows Ghost tried to shadow_strike (5,1) last turn — moving up toward us. Shade tried to shadow_strike (4,3). Ghost is a priority threat moving toward Bastion at (5,2). I should scan Ghost again to deal 1 damage (it's wounded, finishing it helps), or scan Lifeline to damage the healer. Lifeline is keeping enemies alive — dealing 1dmg to wounded Lifeline could be high value. Current position (5,3) has both in range. I'll scan Lifeline to pressure the healer, then move to maintain distance if needed. Actually Ghost is the assassin threat targeting our damage dealer — dealing 1 more dmg to wounded Ghost could eliminate it. Scan Ghost for 1dmg.

Orders are to move toward backline and away from enemies. I'm at (0,0), enemies are all far right. Moving north along the left edge keeps me away from enemies. Max movement is 3 tiles. Moving to (0,3) gets me furthest from the action while staying on the backline flank.

I'm at 1HP so I need to be careful. Bastion is at (5,2) distance 2 - I can move to (4,2) which puts me behind Bastion and adjacent. Then use breach to take control of Bastion. This disrupts the enemy sentinel and keeps me alive by not taking damage directly. Move to (4,2) first, then breach Bastion.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies and toward enemy Oracle Prophet at (4,4), positioning yourself to block their retreat.

secondAction.addendum: Move away from allies toward edge, then wait.
